Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Andrew Dixon's claim to Surplus Funds deposited with the Court is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Clerk of the Court shall disburse $$50,138.94, plus interest, if any. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
